sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57537" key="kirro/xrws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κιρρόχρως</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωτος</itype>, perh. to be read for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κηρόχρως</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0328.tlg001:1:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chaerem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.5</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
